title: Filipino-Style Thai Rice Noodle Stir Fry
description: A fusion of Thai and Filipino flavors in a quick and easy stir fry made with rice noodles, pancit, and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add chopped green onions and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add rice noodles, pancit, crunchy peanuts, and Filipino-style vegetables. Stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce and Thai red curry paste. Pour the sauce over the noodle mixture and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt to taste. Serve hot and enjoy.
Optional: garnish with additional green onions and crunchy peanuts, if desired.
